evals.prompt: How do I set up a multi-channel sequence in Mixmax with email, phone, and LinkedIn?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a Mixmax sequence with email, phone, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator steps.

assertions.name: sequence_setup
assertions.description: Must explain how to create a sequence with multiple channel types (email, phone, LinkedIn Sales Navigator steps)

assertions.name: linkedin_requirement
assertions.description: Must note that LinkedIn Sales Navigator license is required separately for InMail and connection request steps

assertions.name: best_practices
assertions.description: Must include practical guidance on stage timing and mixing automated vs manual steps

evals.prompt: I want to automatically add prospects to a Mixmax sequence when an opportunity moves to a specific stage in Salesforce. How do I set that up?
evals.expected_output: Guide to configuring advanced Salesforce-triggered rules in Mixmax with plan requirements.

assertions.name: plan_requirement
assertions.description: Must clearly state that Salesforce object-triggered rules require Growth+CRM plan (~$89/user/mo)

assertions.name: rule_configuration
assertions.description: Must walk through creating an advanced rule with a Salesforce Opportunity trigger and sequence enrollment action

assertions.name: testing_advice
assertions.description: Must recommend testing the rule with a single record before applying broadly

evals.prompt: I want to use the Mixmax API to programmatically add recipients to a sequence. How does the API work?
evals.expected_output: API guidance for adding sequence recipients with authentication and rate limit awareness.

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Must point to references/mixmax-api-reference.md for full API documentation

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Must explain API key authentication via the X-API-Token header

assertions.name: rate_limit_warning
assertions.description: Must warn about undocumented rate limits and recommend conservative batching
